name: jkramer-marketplace
description: Jon Kramer's personal plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: deckling
plugins.description: Generate native PPTX files using Anthropic Platform Skills. No ugly python-pptx - uses Anthropic's server-side rendering engine.

plugins.name: mvp-launch
plugins.description: Web app MVP launch readiness checker. Analyzes codebases against a battle-tested 10-point checklist (Stripe, mobile, onboarding, AI stability, emails, logging, feedback, auth, domain, database).

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: AI-native product management for startups. Transform Claude into an expert PM with competitive research, gap analysis using the WINNING filter, PRD generation, and GitHub Issues integration.

plugins.name: jkramer
plugins.description: Custom productivity skills: meeting transcripts → Notion summaries + action items

plugins.name: product-manager-prompts
plugins.description: PM validation and prompting toolkit based on Dean Peters' product-manager-prompts. Structured frameworks for Jobs-to-be-Done, user stories, positioning statements, customer journey mapping, PESTEL analysis, TAM/SAM/SOM, Working Backwards, and Proto-Personas.

skills.name: excalidraw
skills.description: Generate architecture diagrams as .excalidraw files from codebase analysis, with optional PNG/SVG export via Playwright.

skills.name: uat-testing
skills.description: End-to-end User Acceptance Testing for web applications. Analyzes branch changes, generates exhaustive test cases, executes via Playwright, and produces pass/fail reports with screenshots.
